project_type: TypeScript monorepo - device-control package for Capacitor mobile app
test_framework: vitest with inline mocks, describe/it/expect pattern
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck: cd packages/device-control && npx tsc --noEmit. 2. Run tests: cd packages/device-control && npx vitest run. 3. Both must pass with zero errors.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in the workspace root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: Commit message format: feat(device-control): ... . Max 500 LOC per PR. All typecheck and tests must pass.
key_patterns: 1. All imports use .js extension (ESM). 2. Providers implement CapabilityProvider interface from capabilities/types.ts. 3. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect with vi.fn() mocks. 4. Agents take a config object with provider + permissionManager. 5. Types/interfaces in separate files from implementations. 6. Index files re-export public API.
directory_structure: packages/device-control/src/ contains: capabilities/ (interfaces), providers/ (implementations), agents/ (intent handlers), permissions/ (permission manager), audit/ (action audit), __tests__/ (all test files), index.ts (public exports), registry.ts (capability registry)
